programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack eavesdrop on Blakey's medical - and completely misinterpret its findings. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Mum wins a holiday for two in sunny Spain, so Stan, Olive and Arthur compete to do the chores in the hope that she will invite them to accompany her. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Doris Hare(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby decides to express repentance for his numerous sins, at the urging of his latest lodger, a religious student. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter, Don Warrington and Frances de la Tour(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: A pile of manure is dumped on the pitch and Maggie and Kevin argue over her sister. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Fred collapses with a heart attack just moments away from a memorable victory on the pitch. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Tension mounts as explosives go missing from Lord Ashfordly's quarry just before the Defence Minister is due to arrive on an official visit to Fylingdales early warning station, prompting Blaketon to embark on an off-the-record investigation. Meanwhile, Dr Alway makes the mistake of enlisting Vernon and David as bellringers - will the duo drop a clanger?(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Joe is finding Mark difficult to live with, Kim does not want Frank to know that she has left Neil, Nick is fed up of Seth still living with them after Meg's death(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Archie finds it difficult to ask Seth to leave, Jack is dreading telling Annie about the farmhouse, and Kim and Frank come face to face in the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is stunned to hear Mark has left school, Vera is thrilled when Terry remembers Tom's birthday, and Amy is shocked when Andy suggests they get married(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mark starts at Oakhill Grammar School, nervous of the posh pupils, Amy tells Andy her life is too complicated for her to rush into marriage, and Bet puts Tanya on a week's trial(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy set out to find a motive for a terminally ill property developer's murder. Many of the Badger's Drift residents have reason to hold a grudge against their charmless neighbour, including a theatre director with unhappy childhood memories, whom Cully gets the chance to work with. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Richard Briers and Judy Parfitt(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Tension mounts as explosives go missing from Lord Ashfordly's quarry just before the Defence Minister is due to arrive on an official visit to Fylingdales early warning station, prompting Blaketon to embark on an off-the-record investigation. Meanwhile, Dr Alway makes the mistake of enlisting Vernon and David as bellringers - will the duo drop a clanger?(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: After enjoying a trip to the theatre with Captain Hastings, the detective is disturbed by the sound of gunshots in an apartment at Whitehaven Mansions, and soon finds himself investigating a murder. Drama, starring David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby reluctantly joins wife Joyce on a spa weekend at Swavely Manor, a country house offering treatments to soothe the mind and body. However, as he attempts to unwind, a woman is found dead in a flotation chamber and he promptly abandons his therapy to investigate - but the body count soon rises. The detective eventually wraps up the case, but it proves to be his last as he makes a big decision about his future. John Nettles' final appearance in the long-running series, with guest stars Ronni Ancona, Geraldine James and Lesley Manville(n)

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. When the body of investigative journalist Matt Barber is found in a holiday chalet in a remote village, Banks and his team are initially confronted by an overwhelming number of leads. As the detective identifies a connection between the victim and a mysterious death in the 1980s connected to the surviving members of a cult rock band, he must begin to unpick decades of lies. To make matters worse, the deceased man's father is former senior police officer Jack Barber, who is now a candidate in the local commissioner elections - and Morton is convinced he is obstructing their inquiry. Stephen Tompkinson stars(n)

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With lawyer David Hornby now a suspect, Cabbot is forced to admit the father of her baby doesn't know about her pregnancy. She then discovers band member Martin Soames' confession in the John Gaunt case file is missing and that Matt Barber's father Jack was the original investigating officer, leading Helen to believe she has the evidence she needs to push the former policeman harder. But when Banks learns of a mysterious tape recording that appears to link Jack with the Crystal Kiss, he realises he's in a race to find it if he is to have any hope of uncovering the truth. Stephen Tompkinson stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan is having difficulty supporting the whole family on his meagre earnings. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby imagines he is rich after being left a sizeable sum in his uncle's will. But there is a condition attached - and the landlord has to seek Miss Jones's help if he has any hope of seeing the money. Andrew Sachs guest stars, with Leonard Rossiter and Frances de la Tour(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Mim sustains an injury, leaving Roger with the responsibility of organising the team teas, and Alex's insecure girlfriend puts in an appearance. Cricketing comedy drama, with Brenda Blethyn and Robert Daws(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger's pre-match strategy has a dramatic impact in the team's hotel room on the night before the Cromer game. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: After enjoying a trip to the theatre with Captain Hastings, the detective is disturbed by the sound of gunshots in an apartment at Whitehaven Mansions, and soon finds himself investigating a murder. Drama, starring David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A serious road accident causes chaos for the residents of Aidensfield when a tanker containing a mysterious substance is breached, leaving a reservoir polluted and Ashfordly police tearing their hair out as they try to track down the culprit. Luckily, the staff of nearby St Aidan's Royal Free hospital are on hand to offer some much-needed assistance(n)

programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales(n)

programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Spurred into action by the discovery of a woman's body in Midsomer Worthy's Raven's Wood, Barnaby and Troy re-examine three similar unsolved murders in the same village nine years previously, hoping to get a lead before the killer strikes again. As they dig deeper into the clandestine world of the community, they find themselves embroiled in a sinister web of deceit, violence and mystery. Guest starring Toby Jones and Phyllis Logan(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A serious road accident causes chaos for the residents of Aidensfield when a tanker containing a mysterious substance is breached, leaving a reservoir polluted and Ashfordly police tearing their hair out as they try to track down the culprit. Luckily, the staff of nearby St Aidan's Royal Free hospital are on hand to offer some much-needed assistance(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth takes a break on the island of Rhodes, where an English beauty draws attention by flirting with fellow guests at the Palace Hotel. When she is found murdered, her husband is immediately suspected, but Poirot quickly deduces there is more to the case than a simple crime of passion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates a double poisoning, aiming to prove the innocence of Elinor Carlisle, the chief suspect in the deaths of her aunt and her rival in love. However, it emerges that she is the only person with a motive, opportunity and means to administer the poison. Crime drama, starring David Suchet, Elisabeth Dermot-Walsh, Diana Quick, Paul McGann and Rupert Penry-Jones(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: James, Tim and Chris are exposed as having lied about their whereabouts on the night Hayley died. Pete reveals that he saw Eliot climbing into the holiday home through a window on New Year's Day, while leaves James struggling with the possibility that his son may have killed Hayley. Fran cracks a code in the dead girl's diary, suggesting that she met a local drug dealer on the night she disappeared(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: The team discovers a number of items that appear to belong to Hayley in Tim's house, providing the damning evidence needed to convict him of her murder. He tries to protest his innocence, claiming he bought them for his daughters at a fete. His story seems to be backed up when Jessica and her mother reveal that none of the items found belong to Hayley, leaving the investigation back at square one. Meanwhile, a new discovery has a shocking impact on the detectives, but proves especially devastating for Cassie(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan indulges a whim and lifts Doreen off the ground, but strains his back in the process. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack asks Arthur's sister out to the Boxing Day social - much to her brother's displeasure. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.desc: Joe is surprised that Sally has not told Kevin what happened. Reg, Curly, Deirdre, Alf and Emily attend Brendan's funeral. Raquel is accepted onto the modelling course(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally is desperate not to be alone with Joe. Raquel doesn't want to face Bet and tell her she's leaving. Vicky is pleased to see Steve. Debi feels trapped by the shop(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy takes a mystery phone call and Chris is suspicious. Neil takes Kim to look at some stables that are for sale. Chris demands that a drunken Frank hands over his car keys(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Michael prepares for his trial to begin. Worry gets the better of Elizabeth and she refuses to eat. Archie is confused by Zoe's behaviour(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A magistrate does his best to protect a young troublemaker - until an embarrassing connection between the two comes to light. Rural police drama, starring Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A nostalgic Stan remembers his first day at the depot, when he was a conductor and Blakey was a driver. He also recounts the events leading to Arthur and Olive's engagement. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Stephen Lewis and Michael Robbins(n)

programme.desc: Blakey cuts the canteen's opening hours, but when he sacks one of the staff, things really turn nasty. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.desc: Rigsby lets a room to a young couple he believes have just got married - unaware that they are not man and wife. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.desc: The team turns out for another Saturday game. Comedy, starring Josie Lawrence, Timothy Spall, Robert Daws and Brenda Blethyn(n)

programme.desc: Part two of two. With lawyer David Hornby now a suspect, Cabbot is forced to admit the father of her baby doesn't know about her pregnancy. She then discovers band member Martin Soames' confession in the John Gaunt case file is missing and that Matt Barber's father Jack was the original investigating officer, leading Helen to believe she has the evidence she needs to push the former policeman harder. But when Banks learns of a mysterious tape recording that appears to link Jack with the Crystal Kiss, he realises he's in a race to find it if he is to have any hope of uncovering the truth. Stephen Tompkinson stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates a double poisoning, aiming to prove the innocence of Elinor Carlisle, the chief suspect in the deaths of her aunt and her rival in love. programme.desc: Historian Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century visionary Dutch artist Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn, who was famed for his skilful handling of light and shade in paintings portraying the human form. Born in Leiden in 1606, the eighth of nine children, his passion for art led him to an apprenticeship with a local painter, and from the time he was a 19-year-old he had a studio in Amsterdam, where he produced 75 self-portraits. Demand for his talents soon grew and success came when he was commissioned to paint The Anatomy Lesson of Dr Tulp(n)

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: The story of Lady Jane Grey's brief rule as queen and execution in the Tower. Chief curator Tracy Borman explores how Edward VI's will placed her on the throne while still in her teens, only for the dead king's sister Mary to proclaim herself queen in defiance of his wishes, but with great public support. The programme features footage of the annual flower-laying ceremony on the anniversary of Jane's death(n)

programme.desc: Susan Calman heads to Stirling, Scotland's historical heartland. At the iconic Wallace Monument, she learns what is like to hold William Wallace's sword, before climbing to the top to enjoy the view. In the Great Hall of Stirling Castle, the ex-Strictly star is taught how to Highland dance, all while uncovering a few secrets about Mary Queen of Scots. Continuing with the theme of traditional entertainment, Susan also has a go on the bagpipes and tries her hand at curling. programme.title: Animals After Dark
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is back at the hedgehog hospital when an emergency patient is brought in, and also meets a barn owl, one of the night's most ferocious hunters. Miranda Krestovnikoff is in Scotland looking for orphaned pine marten Polly, who was released back into the wild but is struggling, while Lindsey Chapman witnesses the backyard drama as badgers prove they really don't know how to share when a vixen has to face them to get food for her cubs(n)

programme.title: The Highland Midwife
programme.desc: On the north east coast, midwife Sheena looks after a woman who recently had a miscarriage, and is concerned about her pregnancy this time around. Pam, who works at Belford Hospital in the town of Fort William below Ben Nevis, hopes to deliver Fiona's second baby there, just as she delivered her first child. Fiona's first baby was premature, and Pam is concerned that might happen again. Meanwhile, Karen and her husband Stuart face a problem as neither of them drive and could struggle to get to the hospital when Karen goes into labour(n)

programme.title: The Science of Sleep: How to Sleep Better
programme.desc: The British Sleep Council says that 70 per cent of people in the UK do no get enough sleep. Gaby Roslin and Amir Khan present the first of two programmes in which they aim to put things right, applying the latest science to some of Britain's worst sleepers. They include a sleep deprivation experiment, as well as help for an extreme snorer and a man who suffers from night terrors(n)

programme.title: The Hunting
programme.desc: Zoe's story comes out to the public, throwing Andy's family into disarray. Eliza, who gave the story to the press in anger at the school's lacklustre response, sees her own relationship with Ray damaged as a result. Meanwhile, Zoe allies with Nassim and Amandip, and convinces them to go public too. Drama, starring Asher Keddie and Richard Roxburgh(n)

programme.title: Death by Selfie
programme.desc: Will Best explores how people's obsession with taking selfies is affecting their physical and psychological wellbeing. They include the urban explorers scaling tower blocks with no safety equipment in their bid to take the most extreme self-portraits, the make-up artist who has had more than 60 cosmetic procedures to ensure he always has a 'selfie-ready' face and the man whose addiction to his cameraphone led to a suicide attempt(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Listen, Even When Your Heart Is Crying: Documentary which explores deaf people's experience of their parents' grief(n)

programme.title: Mrs Pollifax - Spy (1971)
programme.desc: A bored widow desperate for excitement becomes an agent for the CIA. However, her first mission lands her in an Albanian jail, handcuffed to a handsome stranger. Espionage comedy, written by and starring Rosalind Russell, with Darren McGavin, Nehemiah Persoff and Harold Gould(n)

programme.title: The Battle at Apache Pass (1952)
programme.desc: Apache chief Cochise resolves to make a treaty allowing his people to live in peace with white settlers. However, his hot-headed fellow leader Geronimo disagrees, and puts the negotiations at risk by embarking on a murder spree, incurring the wrath of his enemies. Western, with John Lund, Jeff Chandler and Susan Cabot(n)

programme.title: Earthquake (1974)
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a catastrophic earthquake in Los Angeles, an architect helping in the rescue effort searches the smouldering ruins for his missing wife. Meanwhile, other residents, including an insubordinate cop, a lecherous shopkeeper and a daredevil motorcyclist, face their own battles for survival. Disaster movie, starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, Genevieve Bujold, Richard Roundtree and George Kennedy(n)

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan(n)

programme.title: The River Wild (1994)
programme.desc: A headstrong white-water rafting expert embarks on a holiday with her family, but their fun comes to an abrupt end when two killers show up. The fugitives' only escape route from the law is down a raging river, so they take the woman and her son hostage to act as guides. Meanwhile, her husband desperately tries to keep track from the riverbank, waiting for his opportunity to launch a rescue attempt. Action thriller, starring Meryl Streep, Kevin Bacon, David Strathairn, Joseph Mazzello and John C Reilly(n)

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
programme.desc: When a dark force threatens a vast metropolis, special operatives Valerian and Laureline must race to identify the menace and protect the future of the universe. Luc Besson's epic sci-fi adventure, starring Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne and Clive Owen(n)

programme.title: Sweet Sixteen (2002)
programme.desc: A boy tries to save his jailbird mother from danger on the streets of a Scottish coastal town, by creating a safe haven where she can escape the grasp of the two men in her life. However, his efforts to raise the necessary funds lead him and his friends into all manner of schemes, and he is soon dangerously out of his depth. Ken Loach's drama, starring Martin Compston, Annmarie Fulton, William Ruane, Michelle Coulter and Gary McCormack(n)

programme.title: Tangerine (2015)
programme.desc: Transgender prostitute Sin-Dee Rella returns to her West Hollywood neighbourhood on Christmas Eve following a stint in jail, only to discover that her pimp boyfriend Chester has slept with another woman while she was incarcerated. Despite her trans best friend Alexandra's efforts to calm her down, Sin-Dee is determined to hunt the woman down. Comedy drama shot entirely with iPhones, starring Kitana Kiki Rodriguez, Mya Taylor, Karren Karagulian and James Ransone(n)

programme.title: The Blue Dahlia (1946)
programme.desc: A war-weary pilot returns home from service in Europe, but his welcome is far from warm. Not only must he deal with the news of his wife's infidelities, but he also finds himself accused of her murder. However, the wife of his dead spouse's lover is on hand to help him prove his innocence. Thriller, written by Raymond Chandler and starring Alan Ladd, Veronica Lake, William Bendix and Doris Dowling(n)

programme.title: The Tall Stranger (1957)
programme.desc: A Union soldier struggles to recover from a violent encounter with a gang of lawless cattle rustlers, but his recuperation is cut short as he works to ensure the safety of a group of Confederate homesteaders journeying north at the end of the Civil War. Western based on a novel by Louis L'Amour, starring Joel McCrea, Virginia Mayo, Michael Ansara and Michael Pate(n)

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees (1944)
programme.desc: Construction workers battle against Japanese forces while working with the US navy in the South Pacific during the Second World War, while the head of the company and an officer compete for the affections of a local woman. However, when one recklessly causes a tragedy, he seeks redemption by launching an attack on a tank battalion. Drama, starring John Wayne, Susan Hayward and Dennis O'Keefe(n)

programme.title: Crack in the World (1965)
programme.desc: A dying scientist and his colleagues conduct experiments to harness the Earth's inner energy that seem set to end in disaster. Sci-fi thriller, with Dana Andrews, Janette Scott, Kieron Moore and Alexander Knox(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry(n)

programme.title: The Florida Project (2017)
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl roams the grounds of the motel where she lives with her mother, looking for adventure with her small band of friends. Manager Bobby keeps a protective eye on the children, but his affection for them becomes strained as their mischief escalates. Drama, starring Willem Dafoe, Brooklynn Prince and Bria Vinaite(n)

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor(n)

programme.title: Secretary (2002)

programme.desc: Adam worries that sexual tension may develop between him and his long-time friend Emmy. Beverly is caught reading Erica's diary, and vows to trust her daughter instead of snooping in future. However, her new faith is soon taken advantage of. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica join Adam and his friends Emmy, Dana and Chad on a treasure hunt inspired by the Goonies when Pops misplaces some family jewels and Beverly threatens to reorganise his financial affairs if he fails to find them. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin and Wendi McLendon-Covey(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On Halloween, the squad members follow precinct tradition and pull out all the stops as they compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius in the Halloween Heist. Peralta, Santiago and Holt are the determined competitors - but who will be crowned the reigning champion?(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Pimento and Diaz decide to tie the knot, the squad members try to prepare the perfect wedding under Santiago's careful direction. Peralta and Gina help Pimento to find his grandmother's ruby earrings so that Diaz can wear them at the ceremony. Jason Mantzoukas guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon are forced to defend themselves against criticism from an online bully after publishing a physics paper. Meanwhile, the girls confront embarrassing moments from their pasts during a night in. Comedy, guest starring Stephen Hawking, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard receives shocking news as everyone prepares for the re-opening of the comic-book store. Penny tries to teach Sheldon how to 'let it go', but she is unable to follow her own advice when she learns something infuriating about Amy. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Fillion, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Meld and Joe write thank you cards to everyone who sent them wedding gifts, and pretend to be delighted with a huge, ugly coffee maker given to them by Aunt Bunny and Uncle Bert. Meld makes Joe return the machine to the shop, but then Bunny and Bert pay an unexpected visit to the newlyweds. Lennox is upset when Marco gets an offer he cannot refuse. Valerie Harper (Rhoda) guest stars(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel discovers that Joe used to be a member of a boy band in his youth, but when she buys Dani a piano to foster her dreams of a musical career, she is surprised to find that Joe is completely opposed to the idea of his daughter attempting to become a musician. Zander tries to keep it a secret from his girlfriend Lilah that he and Lennox are working together(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben poses as Brad, Bonnie's absent husband, when her friends from work refuse to believe she has an attractive, younger partner. When Danny begins dating a beautiful actress as a publicity stunt, Riley decides to go back out with Ross to make Danny jealous. Tucker tries to further his career as an entertainment reporter by getting the real scoop on Danny and his 'new girlfriend'(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Riley both realise they are getting more than they bargained for by dating older partners, so they work together to formulate a plan to get out of their respective relationships. When Bonnie and Tucker gain insider information about the players on Danny's hockey team, they bet against the Rangers to win some cash(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords wants to file an official complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he is off duty, but Captain Holt has other ideas. Peralta and Santiago glimpse the difficulties of parenthood when they babysit for Jeffords' children(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Cindy and Luke wake up in the Loveboat together. Elsewhere, Romeo and Marnie try to convince James to get back into the dating scene, but he feels like it is too soon(n)

programme.title: The Good Place
programme.desc: Eleanor and her friends contemplate their fates, wondering which of them will be forced to relocate to the Bad Place and whether Michael can do anything to help(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery(n)

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Octavia and Diyoza discover the threats posed by the new planet. Meanwhile, Jordan investigates Sanctum, and Clarke and Bellamy clash(n)

programme.title: Krypton
programme.desc: Sci-fi drama set on Superman's home planet. General Zod uses Nyssa-Vex to further his cause. Elsewhere, Adam Strange and Seg-El evade the bounty hunter Lobo(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is torn between his relationship with Bernadette and pleasing his mother - and comes up with a solution that leaves everyone unsatisfied. Leonard rekindles his romance with Raj's sister Priya, while Amy uses Penny's emotions as the basis for a research project(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to make a new set of friends as he is depressed that the group's social world revolves around Leonard rather than himself. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette try to persuade Penny to go on a date. Comedy, guest starring LeVar Burton, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Angela Keenan and Jon Benbow-Brown have visited Menorca five times together, and have fallen in love with the laid-back way of life on the island. The pair are planning to retire there full-time, so Ben Hillman shows them five houses on the island for their budget of £165,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Kay Havard and Paul Young wish to buy a holiday home for romantic weekends away and to share with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas does her best to impress them with five properties on Spain's Costa Blanca for their budget of £80,000(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet James and Graham, who are unable to agree about their 17th-century cottage in the Surrey village of Cranleigh. They need more space and while Graham thinks the answer to their problem would be to sell, James fancies an extension. Kirstie has an economical plan to redesign the house, while Phil finds out what £650,000 gets you in Britain's most expensive county(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor, while three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salon owner Hannah hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Devon, hoping to impress her guests with a menu bursting with taste sensations(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second dinner party in Devon is hosted by funeral director and BMX fanatic Simon, who hopes his big portions and 'man food' will win him the cash prize at the end of the week(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Body artist Pascale hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Devon, preparing a Vietnamese menu full of flavour and colour in an effort to impress her guests enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, her cooking attire for the starter leaves little to the imagination, Nick and Simon find some unusual artwork in her bedroom, Hannah discovers an unwanted guest in her main course, and Nick hits a nerve with Ajay(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nick hosts the fourth night in Devon, preparing a menu that he hopes represents his personality - big, bold and brash - although after his argument with Ajay, he is planning on turning down the banter. However, salon owner Hannah is not impressed with Nick's venison main and ladybird-loving Pascale finds the portions a bit too big. But undertaker Simon is happy to polish off any leftovers - is Nick in with a chance of bagging the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Ajay hopes her nautical-themed evening will see her sail to victory on the fifth and final night in Devon. Along with a gigantic seafood spread, she has also laid on a boat trip around Torquay harbour. However, all does not go quite to plan in the galley. The guests later gather to discover who has won the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke gets to work on a 300-year-old house in Broadstairs, which was once a school and a retirement community, leaving it with a few quirky features - not least a row of three toilets. For inspiration, he visits the Royal Pavilion in Brighton. He also helps a couple make the most of the tiny living room in their 1930s south London bungalow(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras return to Chester Zoo, where Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake, and decides to escape. Meanwhile, young giraffe Narus has been battling with other young males in the herd, so the keepers think that it's time to move him to a new zoo. Which is easier said than done(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick fears the worst when a young cockapoo is hit by a lawnmower, and he faces the challenge of saving as much of its leg as possible. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old labrador struggles with pain in its elbows, and a German Shepherd-Collie cross is suffering with a bulging disk in his spin and hip dysplasia(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Tim and Zoe Bawtree, who live in a costly Regency property in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, plan to build a modern, low-maintenance house in their back garden. However, height restrictions mean 60 per cent of their new home has to be underground and there are 90 objections from neighbours to their planning application. Undeterred, the pair press ahead, only to encounter further problems - including the departure of the builders(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As Dick and Angel prepare for winter, they attend a food festival in Rouen, where they hope to find inspiration over what to do with their fresh fruit and vegetables. Angel adds the finishing touches to the floating geodesic dome in time for a family sleepover, while Dick gets to work fixing the crumbling stucco(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the last series, Howard Evans and Prue Chiles helped reworked midwife Mandy's 1980s house, transforming the ugly exterior and first-floor living area. Now George revisits Nottingham's Park Estate to find out if Mandy has managed to complete the transformation and make the ground floor equally as spectacular(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Railway
programme.desc: A ride along the West Highland line with train conductor Suzie Sangan, and a look behind the scenes at the new restaurant at Aviemore station(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patient's wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to A&E by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get John's pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the famous quiz, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests Jonathan Ross and Roisin Conaty. Countdown regular Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner with David O'Doherty, while maths whizz Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers with a little 'help' from Joe Wilkinson(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras return to Chester Zoo, where Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake, and decides to escape. Meanwhile, young giraffe Narus has been battling with other young males in the herd, so the keepers think that it's time to move him to a new zoo. Which is easier said than done(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick fears the worst when a young cockapoo is hit by a lawnmower, and he faces the challenge of saving as much of its leg as possible. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old labrador struggles with pain in its elbows, and a German Shepherd-Collie cross is suffering with a bulging disk in his spin and hip dysplasia(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates malt, revealing how one of the unsung heroes of the kitchen cupboard is produced, while Jimmy Doherty follows the trail from Russia to Ramsgate to discover why caviar is so expensive and Matt Tebbutt examines what goes into muesli(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Lynne and Peter Evans seek a home in Fuerteventura, so Ben Hillman shows them five great options for their £80,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Young-at-heart couple Natalie and Andy Ray love Florida for its fun-filled attractions and weather, and are looking for a future family holiday home there. Ben Hillman tempts them with five homes within easy reach of the theme parks, all within their budget of £280,000(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit the Alcorn family in Peebles in the Scottish Borders. The family of four lives in a conservation area and while dad Dave loves their grey-stone Victorian villa for its picture-book charm, mum Amy despises its lack of practicality. With no off-road parking, no third bedroom and no downstairs bathroom - not to mention the small, draughty kitchen - she has quite a list. Would it be best to simply move on to one of the new properties picked out by Phil, or can Kirstie come up with a way of making their home work?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree as they help British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Performing arts teacher Helen hosts the first dinner party in Sheffield, but her flamboyant cooking does not go to according to plan(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Design and technology teacher Claire hosts the second day of the competition in Sheffield, and hopes her Asian-inspired menu with a spot of clay model-making will impress her fellow diners enough to net her the points she'll need to secure the cash prize. However, former chef Simon Hollings proves difficult to faze, and the eccentric Helen irritates the other contestants with another audacious display at the dinner table(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Service administrator Monika hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Sheffield. She treats her guests to a traditional Bulgarian night inspired by her homeland, in the hope of impressing them enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, some of the guests are unsure about her Bulgarian delicacies, and the host must fight for control when the two teachers go head-to-head and when Simon makes sexist jokes(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Sheffield sees musician Ivor's turn to host, and he is determined to make it a fun evening with a menu inspired by 1980s pop and a performance by his new romantic band(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former chef Simon hosts the final meal in Sheffield, but is unlikely to get an easy ride from his guests following all the criticism he has dished out at the earlier soirees. He also has to contend with the feud that's brewing between Claire and Helen, and when things boil over between the women, Monika doesn't know where to hide(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps the owners of an Edwardian family home with an unfortunate combination of wall-to-wall 1970s panelling, an indestructible cement staircase and a boxy bathroom shoved into a bay window. He also helps a couple update their Tudor cottage by knocking two rooms together to create an opulent master en suite(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Elderly cheetah Matrah is ostracised by his brothers Burba and Singha when he starts to show signs of a leg injury. Cameras also follow Chester Zoo's Sumatran orangutans, including adolescent female Tuti and four-month-old Kesuma. And there's also a look at Asian pond turtle Shrek, whose love life proved fatal for a previous mate(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador that is both a guide for the blind and a seizure alert dog, and has become lame in both its front legs. Invasive surgery could mean that the dog's owner, Toni, is without her lifeline. Meanwhile, a couple hope that surgery will save their Rhodesian Ridgeback's leg from a cancerous tumour, and Fitzpatrick Referrals receptionist Natalie's Tibetan terrier becomes unwell(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Architect Martin Pease plans an unusual home for his family where everything is white and open plan. He calls upon his experience of designing commercial buildings to build the house and uses materials and systems more commonly used in office projects. The biggest risk is that his house may look more like a car showroom than a comfortable retreat(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel expand the project by setting up a luxury campsite on the chateau grounds, but they only have six weeks to complete it before the first guests arrive - and the weather is not on their side, with constant rain turning the planned site into a muddy field. They also have to contend with a visit from Dick's family at Easter(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the demands placed on the women and men who answer people's cries for help. As an ambulance crew answers a call to a heart attack, call handlers guide the victim's daughter through administering CPR. A nine-year-old boy is coached through a terrifying situation when his mother suffers a diabetic emergency while driving, and a father-to-be is instructed how to deliver his baby over the phone(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: A man who has collapsed by the roadside is suspected of having taken drugs, and a 15-year-old girl is treated after having a fit, only to begin having a second seizure(n)

programme.title: Mary Kills People
programme.desc: When Olivia attempts to blackmail Mary, she is drawn deeper and deeper into a deadly game of cat and mouse(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Elderly cheetah Matrah is ostracised by his brothers Burba and Singha when he starts to show signs of a leg injury. Cameras also follow Chester Zoo's Sumatran orangutans, including adolescent female Tuti and four-month-old Kesuma. And there's also a look at Asian pond turtle Shrek, whose love life proved fatal for a previous mate(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador that is both a guide for the blind and a seizure alert dog, and has become lame in both its front legs. Invasive surgery could mean that the dog's owner, Toni, is without her lifeline. Meanwhile, a couple hope that surgery will save their Rhodesian Ridgeback's leg from a cancerous tumour, and Fitzpatrick Referrals receptionist Natalie's Tibetan terrier becomes unwell(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team returns to explore the secrets behind mass-produced food, meeting technicians, scientists, factory owners, growers and producers, finding out exactly what goes into the everyday groceries that end up on the supermarket shelves. Jimmy Doherty finds out how Sri Lanka is coping with a looming coconut shortage, while Kate Quilton discovers whether compostables could be the answer to worldwide plastic pollution problem, annd Matt Tebbutt is in Paris to learn why the macaron has such a hefty price tag(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Hyacinth Miller from London first visited Barbados 14 years ago, and now that she's retired, wants to permanently relocate there and spend time in the garden. With her son Leon along to help choose the right property, Jasmine Harman shows Hyacinth five properties in the south of the island, but do any of them have her packing her bags for a new life in the sun?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Maureen and Steve Smith head out to Orlando in Florida to search for a holiday home where they can escape the Scottish winters, with a budget of £80,000(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp try to help a couple living in a flat on the River Thames in central London, who disagree on whether they should move. Gareth and Tina have owned the property for 10 years and Tina loves being within walking distance of work, schools, clubs and all the sights, but Gareth wants a big family home and Phil finds a detached house with a pool to tempt the family into the suburbs(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Couple Mariam and Johnno arrive at their new chateau and discover they have no running water, and Julia has a decision to make when she re-visits a chateaux she fell in love with(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Joining her are tough-talking prison transport officer Tina, dreadlocked farm-dweller Stephen, superior IT manager David and glamorous beauty-school teacher Ashleigh. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty teacher Ashleigh throws the second of the week's parties in Co Durham, she hopes a menu of sophisticated dishes - along with a helping of hearts and love - will help her win the cash prize. However, cracks were already beginning to show in the diners' genial facade yesterday, and the hostess realises she must play peacemaker if she is to keep everyone from falling out(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Call centre complaints officer and part-time farmer Stephen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham. He hopes to win the £1,000 prize money by impressing his guests with an evening on his farm, featuring a drinks reception and rustic cuisine. However, self-confessed snob Tina makes it perfectly clear what she thinks of his efforts(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Prison transport officer Tina is the fourth host in Co Durham. She hopes to impress her guests with a sophisticated French menu including salmon crepes, chicken and posh peas and pear dessert. But having been highly critical of everyone else's food so far, will they now take the chance to get their own back or can she win them round?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final evening of gatherings in Co Durham sees IT manager David stage a French-themed soiree in the hope of securing the £1,000 prize. However, he soon finds his main challenge is to keep all his guests on friendly terms(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a typical-looking Victorian terrace in Plumstead that has been stripped of all its original interior features. The question is whether the owners should start from scratch or try to reinstate some of the key period elements. The architect also visits a 1900s villa near Liverpool, where access to the main bedroom is through the bathroom. Can he come up with a much more sensible layout?(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The keepers introduce some new, young males to Bertha, the South American blue poison dart frog that loves to wrestle, in the hope that one of them will be strong enough to win her over. A new mandrill monkey named Kamau arrives at the zoo to be introduced to the group, but the keepers are worried that his lack of experience with females might be a problem(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Family members rush their chihuahua, Darcy, to the clinic after it is hit by a car. For 18-year-old TaJournée, who is autistic, the dog is a lifeline, and Noel must use pins, nuts and bolts to reconstruct the broken pieces of its crushed pelvis. Meanwhile, the vet finds himself in a tricky situation while performing replacement surgery on a seven-year-old spaniel with hip problems, and a Winchester Prison sniffer dog that is lame in both elbows is brought to the surgery(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jo and Shaun Bennett, a couple with a love of gothic architecture and horror movies, plan to use their budget of £400,000 to build an Addams Family-style house, complete with a stained-glass window, a stone fireplace and an oak staircase featuring gargoyles. However, completing the five-bedroom home on limited funds proves difficult(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel transforms the attic into a studio and storage space for her vintage treasures and takes Dorothy on a trip to Paris, while Dick has his own plans for repurposing some ancient tools he finds in the outbuildings. The couple throws a surprise birthday celebration for Angel's mother, where Dick's purpose-built open-fire popcorn maker is put to the test(n)

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The team at St George's treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors can't guarantee he won't lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into A&E by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. Lucy has had a trampolining accident in her family's garden and medics fear the 13-year-old may have suffered a neck injury(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy game show, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests Andrew Flintoff and Rhod Gilbert. programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc test drives the new Aston Martin V8 Vantage, while Rory Reid puts the Rolls-Royce Phantom through its paces to see if it lives up to its reputation as the best car in the world, and Chris Harris makes the case that a Ford Fiesta is better than a Lamborghini. With guest Stephen Mangan(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The items Mike and Frank bought in Europe arrive in the US, and the guys also visit a vintage car company(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori are pitted against the Taylors in San Pedro, where they bid on shipping containers worth a fortune(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon Bernier and his wife Lori continue bidding on storage units in Boston, and make one of their biggest finds(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank explore a fellow picker's sheds and barns. The pair also examine the oddities collected by landowner John Atwater Bradley(n)

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: The team tries to save the police's ailing horse wagons. An officer escapes with his life after a pursuit car is rammed by a stolen 4x4, while the mounted unit keeps the peace at one of the biggest football clashes of the year(n)

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team head to Somerset, where a family of farmers hopes to unearth evidence of a Norman castle believed to have once stood on top of what is known locally as Castle Hill. Records show there used to be such a structure in the area, but there are several likely locations for it. As the dig progresses, an outline of what appears to be a castle keep is revealed, but the findings lead to an unexpected conclusion(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Special edition of the documentary which gets up close and personal with the animals in Chester Zoo's aquatic habitat. Rare blind cave fish Tiny Tim needs a love potion to help him become a father, and Popeye the chalk bass - the toughest fighter on the reef - needs an urgent operation after injuring his eye in an altercation. The zookeepers hope to breed from Ophelia the Mexican lake salamander, of which there are only 100 females left in the world, while young penguin Frazzle needs to find a mate and settle down to family life. But he cannot seem to stop flirting with every female in sight(n)

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Pyramid
programme.desc: Documentary following archaeologists working on a 4,000-year-old pyramid containing a burial chamber, still apparently sealed. As light enters the tomb for the first time, the artefacts contained within reveal a gripping detective story as although there are no signs of entry, the contents have been disturbed. To solve the mystery, Egyptologists explore the nearby Black Pyramid to see how pyramid builders used every trick in the book to protect the treasures, discovering a dark and complex labyrinth of dummy tombs, false passages and stone portcullises to fool robbers(n)

programme.title: Hidden Britain by Drone

Plus, the discovery of a huge timber oval-shaped swimming pool off the edge of the coast(n)

programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary(n)

programme.title: Britain at Low Tide

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Pyramid
programme.desc: Documentary following archaeologists working on a 4,000-year-old pyramid containing a burial chamber, still apparently sealed. As light enters the tomb for the first time, the artefacts contained within reveal a gripping detective story as although there are no signs of entry, the contents have been disturbed. programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: The story of 11-year-old Arya Permana from Indonesia, who weighs 30 stone - nearly three times that of an average man. His status as the world's heaviest boy has brought fame and considerable financial benefits - but when he becomes house-bound and his health begins to deteriorate, his parents realise they must seek medical help. Can the doctors' tests get to the root cause of the boy's extraordinary weight gain?(n)

Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura

programme.desc: The team investigates the bombing of a helicopter that left all six passengers dead. programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: Jessica finds herself embroiled in a murder case in New York while visiting her niece, who has a part in a soap opera in which the actor playing a victim is killed. Starring Angela Lansbury and Terry Kiser(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gang leader is stabbed to death in a prison scuffle, and Briscoe and Green uncover a number of suspects as it becomes clear the victim had numerous enemies on both sides of the law. The investigation results in a charge, but McCoy faces an uphill battle to convict the accused. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a clothes shop owner during an apparent robbery. An open lock suggests someone who works there was responsible, and the trail eventually leads to the son of the dead man's business partner, whose shady dealings were at risk of being exposed. However, the suspect flees to Israel before police have a chance to question him(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a man who had illegally obtained medical records to use in a lawsuit involving a child with spina bifida. Tracking down the litigants, they find the court case is at the heart of a web of deceit dating back to before the girl's conception. US crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Mackenzie Burton disappears from her family home while her mother Pam is taking a bath and when Benson and Stabler investigate, they can find no sign of forced entry. The girl's father tells them that Mackenzie was adopted and also reveals that he and his wife's biological daughter Ella was abducted 10 years previously - a case that remains unsolved. Guest starring Joan Cusack, Peter Strauss and Henry Ian Cusick(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are called to the hospital after the reported rape of a 10-year-old girl, who is so traumatised she won't speak at first, but eventually reveals that the attacker took pictures of her. A media frenzy is sparked when another victim comes forward and the detectives once again cross paths with Erik Weber, the leader of anti-paedophile vigilante group COAP, who points the finger at church warden Edwin Adelson. Guest starring Henry Ian Cusick and Stephen Tobolowsky(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the rapes of several teenage girls in Central Park, but rookie cop Brad Fletcher jeopardises the case when he rashly apprehends and attacks a suspect. Marlowe lays into the officer for potentially ruining her case with his actions, but she is stunned when Cragen then informs her NYPD records show nobody by the name of Brad Fletcher in the system(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man goes missing on his wedding day and his ushers are found handcuffed together in a fountain and covered in blood. They have no recollection of what happened, but toxicity reports reveal they had been drugged, so the detectives use the evidence to retrace their steps to a strip club and a party thrown by a billionaire. Crime drama, starring David Caruso(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A mother-of-two is killed when her car is involved in an accident with a stolen vehicle. A man who initially appears to be a heroic passer-by turns out to be the other driver, and the team is left to investigate whether a crime has been committed or if it was just an unfortunate crash. Starring David Caruso(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a white police officer, and the trail ultimately leads to a former black rights activist. As the trial gets under way, racial tensions in the city are inflamed with the emergence of evidence linking the dead man to several white supremacist organisations. McCoy realises whichever verdict is returned, it is guaranteed to be greeted with public outrage(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Van Buren orders Briscoe and Green to reinvestigate unsolved cases, starting with the murder of a teenager 20 years previously. However, they discover much of the evidence gathered at the time has vanished, and the detective in charge of the case may have pursued an innocent man to protect the real culprit. An unexpected confession allows the case to end up in court again, but legal trickery makes a conviction an unlikely prospect(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Return of the American drama following the work of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service. Gibbs and McGee travel to Russia to escort a computer expert connected to classified intel. However, the mission is compromised and they are forced to go off the grid while being hunted by Russian mercenaries. Meanwhile, the team in DC frantically tries to locate the missing pair. Mark Harmon and Sean Murray star(n)

Crime drama, guest starring Jennifer Love Hewitt(n)

Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The body of a Brazilian woman living in New York on a work visa is discovered in Central Park, and when Laura and the team investigate, they discover she had taken a job as an au pair for a young boy with autism - who has now gone missing. The detectives immediately suspect the lad's father, who lost access to his son during a nasty custody battle, but when it emerges that the victim also had a more sordid side-career with an escort agency, a new facet to her murder is revealed. Starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The corpse of party goer Zach Shaw is brought in as a suicide case after his body fell from a bridge, but the detectives suspect it was a murder. Comedy drama, with Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the strangulation of a college graduate who moonlighted as a stripper to pay off her fees, and learn that the girl's death is linked to insider trading involving a former porn star and her mentor. Jerry Orbach stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The relatives of a wealthy woman found in a coma come under suspicion when the team investigates her subsequent death. David Dukes guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.desc: A man with a history of violence is arrested for the murder of his son's school ice-hockey coach, but pleads mitigating circumstances. Helped by a glib defence lawyer, he claims that he committed the crime while suffering from a previously unknown mental condition he calls 'sports rage'(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of four bodies in a jeweller's shop. Suspicion soon falls on the husband of one of the victims, who is revealed to have changed his identity to escape a shady past. The shop's security tapes are subsequently discovered in his flat, but the defendant surprises everyone by insisting on representing himself in court - and makes a big impression on the jury(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a Navy Lieutenant who has been murdered while on his way to a meeting with the President, and must ascertain whether the killing was part of a recent spate of muggings in the area - or a targeted hit to keep information secret. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

They discover a large box had been delivered to the apartment block two hours beforehand, which was probably how the assailant gained access, and then another man is attacked in a similar way(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are called to an industrial laundry where an environmental activist has been found raped and murdered, with CCTV footage leading them to a car registered to a man who died nine months previously. The detectives visit his son Jason, who tries to make a break for it with a box containing some very odd items, one of which is linked to the victim. Another artefact leads to a woman who reported being raped back in the 1960s, but she now has Alzheimer's and Benson has to talk to her daughter Vivian. The Crime drama, guest starring Alex Kingston, Maria Bello and R Lee Ermey(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is visited by FBI agent Dana Lewis, who claims she has been raped while working on an undercover project, but is worried if she reports it to her superiors they would pull her off the case and everything that she had achieved would go to waste. The detective persuades Dana to let her and Stabler investigate and they follow her to a staged protest against the building of a mosque organised by the group she had infiltrated. Guest starring Marcia Gay Harden (Miller's Crossing, Damages)(n)

programme.title: Looking for Victoria
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part docu-drama. Historical experts discuss Queen Victoria's reign, intercut with Prunella Scales playing the monarch at various key moments of her life, revealing the true personality behind the granite-faced exterior. Prince Albert's death deeply affects the Queen, but she finds comfort in her subsequent friendship with Scottish servant John Brown. With Timothy West and Charles Dance(n)

programme.title: War and Peace (1956)
programme.desc: Three Russian aristocrats - flighty Natasha, pacifist Pierre and military officer Andrei - endure a series of tumultuous events as Naopleon Bonaparte's armies invade their country. While Andrei is sent to the front line, Pierre is drawn into a loveless marriage, ignorant of Natasha's feelings for him. Historical drama based on Leo Tolstoy's novel, starring Audrey Hepburn, Henry Fonda and John Mills(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Dr Giles Yeo investigates the latest diet craze - 'clean eating', the social media sensation that suggests certain foods we eat can actually cleanse our bodies and make us healthier. First, Giles meets with an Instagram entrepreneur behind one of the most popular brands associated with clean eating, before travelling to America to learn more about highly influential alternative health advocates(n)

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Primary School
programme.desc: This edition follows some of the girls at Gascoigne Primary School in Barking, east London, as they navigate their way through the ups and down of relationships. Seven-year-old Alaniss has been diagnosed with conduct disorder and the school has appointed a new education support assistant to work with her, while eight-year-olds Makaya, Scarlett and Khairat fall out and make friends again constantly. Ten-year-old Elsie's best friend is Kierran, who follows her around like a puppy as they used to be boyfriend and girlfriend(n)

programme.title: Lunch Hour (1961)
programme.desc: A junior executive turns his mind to romance, and sets off for a night of passion after reserving a room at a hotel - only for his torrid plans to go awry when his short-term relationship with a designer takes an unexpected turn. programme.title: Love Birds

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Enhanced interrogation methods used by America in the aftermath of 9/11 - including the technique of controlled drowning known as waterboarding - have been condemned as torture. In this report, Hilary Andersson examines how far governments should go in the fight against terrorism, with the programme re-creating what was done and hearing from those who approved, ran and suffered the programme in secret CIA prisons around the world(n)

programme.desc: Ground-breaking research suggests that changes to the bacteria living inside humans are making one in three people develop allergies. This programme follows an experiment involving members of two families to find out what it is in the modern world that's to blame. programme.desc: A Catholic boy and a Jewish girl become close friends, dreaming of becoming explorers in Africa. However, their close bond is threatened by religious divisions in their home town. Drama, starring Loretta Parry and Philip Needs(n)

programme.title: The Go-Between (1971)
programme.desc: When an upper-class woman falls in love with a farmer in Edwardian England, a naive boy helps to keep their relationship alive by delivering secret messages between them - little realising the terrible consequences his actions will have. Period drama based on LP Hartley's novel, starring Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Dominic Guard and Margaret Leighton(n)

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: John Quilter selects his favourite moments from the series that cuts straight to the core of London's food scene(n)

programme.title: Britain's Favourite Supermarket Foods
programme.desc: Cherry Healey presents the second of two programmes in which she explores the unexpected positive health benefits of everyday foods. Here she learns about the brain-boosting capabilities of the humble berry, testing it out on a group of students to see whether it aids their concentration, and reveals the daily staples that can help with everything from the heart to the teeth(n)

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital(n)

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Research suggests the connections in men's and women's brains follow different patterns, which might explain typical forms of gender-specific behaviour. Dr Michael Mosley and Professor Alice Roberts investigate whether these are innate or are shaped by the outside world, using a team of human guinea pigs and a troop of Barbary apes to test the science and challenge old stereotypes. They ask whether this new scientific research will benefit both sexes or drive them even further apart(n)

programme.title: Three Days In Auschwitz
programme.desc: Documentary following a film-maker on a series of visits to the site of the concentration camp, as he researches the fates of members of his family who died there(n)

programme.title: Otway: The Movie (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about the punk singer, following his career from the 1970s to the present day and offering his insights into how to survive in the music business(n)
